caption: A woman with dark hair, wearing a blue and white striped button-down shirt and a black headset with a microphone, is positioned in front of a light-colored wall and a pale yellow curtain. The text "Nancy Ramya" appears in the lower-left corner of the scene. Throughout the sequence, the woman is speaking, and her facial expressions change as she talks. In the beginning, she looks directly forward with a neutral expression. As the sequence progresses, she opens her mouth to speak, briefly closes her eyes, and gestures with her right hand, bringing it slightly upward and toward her chest. The background remains static, featuring a plain wall and the edge of a light-colored piece of furniture to her right.
